title: Park geometry (Phase 2c.3)
description: Per-park ballpark geometry — fence polyline, default atmosphere, centerline bearing. One file per MLB park under infra/park_geometry/<park_id>.json. Loaded by bullpen_training.battedball.parks.loader.

schema_version.description: Bumps if the polyline encoding or units change. Loader refuses unknown versions.

park_id.description: MLB team abbreviation as used in pitches.park_id (V003__pitches.sql). 2-3 chars, uppercase.

altitude_m.description: Field-level elevation above sea level. Drives air density; should match parks.py altitude entry.

pressure_hpa.description: Sea-level-equivalent pressure in hPa; null means 'let the ISA model derive from altitude_m' (the usual case for an annual default).

wind_speed_mph.description: Prevailing wind speed at the park during game time (mph). 0 for domed/closed-roof parks.

wind_bearing_deg.description: Compass bearing the prevailing wind blows FROM (meteorological convention: 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W). Combined with centerline_bearing_deg to project into the stadium xyz frame.

default_atmosphere.description: Defaults used when weather_observed has no row for the game. Per-game weather is wired in 2c.4.

centerline_bearing_deg.description: Bearing of the field's CF axis from true north. 0 = home-plate-to-CF points due north; 90 = east. Used to project wind into the stadium's xyz frame.

fence_polyline.description: Fence definition as (angle, distance, height) points from LF foul pole (-45) toward RF foul pole (+45). Angles in the simulator's convention: + = toward 3B (LF), - = toward 1B (RF). Distances + heights in feet (the published park-dimensions standard).

angle_from_centerline_deg.description: Spray angle vs CF axis. + = toward 3B (LF), - = toward 1B (RF). MLB foul lines are at +/- 45.

behind_fence_stand_height_ft.description: Average stand/structure height immediately behind the fence; reserved for v1.5 deflection modelling, unused by the v1 classifier.

foul_territory_sqft.description: Total foul-territory square footage (publicly reported per park). Reserved for v1.5 foul-out modelling.
